cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees consistently report satisfaction with their financial compensation, benefits, and the availability of flexible time-off policies.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: The organization is recognized for supporting a healthy work-life balance and providing a family-friendly environment.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of the workforce expresses significant stress regarding job security and reports experiencing a culture of fear or toxicity.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel overlooked or frustrated by a lack of clear promotion paths and the negative impact of frequent leadership turnover.
